                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">Prix citoyen min (DA)</label>
                    <input type="number" step="0.001" id="minCitizenPrice" class="form-control" placeholder="0">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">Prix citoyen max (DA)</label>
                    <input type="number" step="0.001" id="maxCitizenPrice" class="form-control" placeholder="∞">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">Prix collecteur min (DA)</label>
                    <input type="number" step="0.001" id="minCollectorPrice" class="form-control" placeholder="0">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">Prix collecteur max (DA)</label>
                    <input type="number" step="0.001" id="maxCollectorPrice" class="form-control" placeholder="∞">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-1">
                    <button class="btn btn-primary w-100 mb-1" onclick="applyFilters()">
                        <i class="fas fa-search"></i> Filtrer
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary w-100" onclick="resetFilters()">
                        <i class="fas fa-undo-alt"></i> Reset
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Boutons de filtre par statut -->
    <div class="btn-group mb-3" role="group">

        <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-success" onclick="setStatusFilter('active')">Actifs</button>
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" onclick="setStatusFilter('inactive')">Inactifs</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Tableau des matériaux -->
    <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
        <div class="card-body p-0">

                    <tbody id="materialsTableBody">

    <!-- ========== MODAL CRÉATION / ÉDITION ========== -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="createMaterialModal" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">

                <div class="modal-body">

                                <input type="text" id="materialName" class="form-control" required>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-4 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Statut</label>

                                </select>
                            </div>

        </div>

    <!-- ========== MODAL MODIFICATION PRIX ========== -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="priceModal" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
        <div class="modal-dialog">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-warning text-dark">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">Modifier les prix</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body">
                    <input type="hidden" id="priceMaterialId">
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <label class="form-label">Prix citoyen (DA/kg)</label>
                        <input type="number" step="0.001" id="modalCitizenPrice" class="form-control">
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <label class="form-label">Prix collecteur (DA/kg)</label>
                        <input type="number" step="0.001" id="modalCollectorPrice" class="form-control">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-warning" onclick="updatePrice()">Mettre à jour</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ========== MODAL DÉTAILS ========== -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="detailModal" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
        <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-secondary text-white">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">Détail du matériau</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body" id="detailContent">Chargement...</div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Fermer</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // ==================== ÉTAT GLOBAL ====================
        let currentFilter = 'all';
        let currentPage = 0;
        let pageSize = 20;
        let totalPages = 0;
        // Filtres avancés
        let searchKeyword = '';
        let minCitizen = null, maxCitizen = null, minCollector = null, maxCollector = null;

        // ==================== UTILITAIRES ====================
        function showModal(id) {
            const modalEl = document.getElementById(id);
            if (modalEl) new bootstrap.Modal(modalEl).show();
        }
        function hideModal(id) {
            const modalEl = document.getElementById(id);
            const modal = bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(modalEl);
            if (modal) modal.hide();
        }
        function escapeHtml(str) {
            if (!str) return '';
            return str.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;' }[m]));
        }
        function formatDate(dateStr) {
            if (!dateStr) return '-';
            return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString('fr-FR');
        }

        // ==================== CHARGEMENT DES STATS ====================
        function loadStats() {
            fetch('/admin/materials-stats')
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    document.getElementById('totalMaterials').innerText = data.totalMaterials || 0;
                    document.getElementById('activeMaterials').innerText = data.activeMaterials || 0;
                    document.getElementById('inactiveMaterials').innerText = data.inactiveMaterials || 0;
                    document.getElementById('configuredPrices').innerText = data.configuredPrices || 0;
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        // ==================== CHARGEMENT DU TABLEAU ====================
        function loadMaterials(filter, page = 0) {
            currentFilter = filter;
            currentPage = page;

            // Si des filtres avancés sont actifs, on les utilise à la place du filtre statut
            if (searchKeyword || minCitizen !== null || maxCitizen !== null || minCollector !== null || maxCollector !== null) {
                loadMaterialsWithFilters();
                return;
            }

            let url = `/admin/materials-data?page=${page}&size=${pageSize}`;
            if (filter === 'active') url += '&filter=active';
            else if (filter === 'inactive') url += '&filter=inactive';

            fetch(url)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(pageData => {
                    renderTable(pageData.content);
                    totalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                    renderPagination(pageData);
                })
                .catch(err => {
                    console.error(err);
                    document.getElementById('materialsTableBody').innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center text-danger">Erreur de chargement</td></tr>';
                });
        }

        function loadMaterialsWithFilters() {
            let url = `/admin/materials-data?page=${currentPage}&size=${pageSize}`;
            if (searchKeyword) url += `&keyword=${encodeURIComponent(searchKeyword)}`;
            if (minCitizen !== null) url += `&minCitizenPrice=${minCitizen}`;
            if (maxCitizen !== null) url += `&maxCitizenPrice=${maxCitizen}`;
            if (minCollector !== null) url += `&minCollectorPrice=${minCollector}`;
            if (maxCollector !== null) url += `&maxCollectorPrice=${maxCollector}`;

            fetch(url)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(pageData => {
                    renderTable(pageData.content);
                    totalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                    renderPagination(pageData);
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        function renderTable(materials) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('materialsTableBody');
            if (!materials || materials.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center text-muted">Aucun matériau trouvé</td></tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = materials.map(m => `
                <tr>
                    <td>${m.id}</td>
                    <td><strong>${escapeHtml(m.name)}</strong></td>
                    <td>${m.basePricePerKg ? m.basePricePerKg.toFixed(3) + ' DA' : '-'}</td>
                    <td>${m.collectorPricePerKg ? m.collectorPricePerKg.toFixed(3) + ' DA' : '-'}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge ${m.isActive ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-secondary'}">${m.isActive ? 'Actif' : 'Inactif'}</span></td>
                    <td>${formatDate(m.createdAt)}</td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-info" onclick="viewDetail(${m.id})" title="Détail"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="editMaterial(${m.id})" title="Modifier"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-warning" onclick="openPriceModal(${m.id})" title="Modifier prix"><i class="fas fa-tag"></i></button>
                            ${m.isActive ?
                                `<button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" onclick="toggleActive(${m.id}, false)" title="Désactiver"><i class="fas fa-ban"></i></button>` :
                                `<button class="btn btn-outline-success" onclick="toggleActive(${m.id}, true)" title="Activer"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i></button>`
                            }
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="deleteMaterial(${m.id})" title="Supprimer"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function renderPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('paginationNav');
            if (totalPages <= 1) {
                nav.innerHTML = '';
                return;
            }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changePage(${currentPage-1}); return false;">Précédent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < totalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === currentPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changePage(${i}); return false;">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changePage(${currentPage+1}); return false;">Suivant</a></li>`;
            html += '</ul>';
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function changePage(page) {
            currentPage = page;
            if (searchKeyword || minCitizen !== null || maxCitizen !== null || minCollector !== null || maxCollector !== null) {
                loadMaterialsWithFilters();
            } else {
                loadMaterials(currentFilter, page);
            }
        }

        // ==================== FILTRES AVANCÉS ====================
        function applyFilters() {
            searchKeyword = document.getElementById('searchKeyword').value.trim();
            minCitizen = parseFloat(document.getElementById('minCitizenPrice').value) || null;
            maxCitizen = parseFloat(document.getElementById('maxCitizenPrice').value) || null;
            minCollector = parseFloat(document.getElementById('minCollectorPrice').value) || null;
            maxCollector = parseFloat(document.getElementById('maxCollectorPrice').value) || null;
            currentFilter = 'all'; // on ignore le statut quand on utilise des filtres avancés
            currentPage = 0;
            loadMaterialsWithFilters();
        }

        function resetFilters() {
            document.getElementById('searchKeyword').value = '';
            document.getElementById('minCitizenPrice').value = '';
            document.getElementById('maxCitizenPrice').value = '';
            document.getElementById('minCollectorPrice').value = '';
            document.getElementById('maxCollectorPrice').value = '';
            searchKeyword = '';
            minCitizen = null;
            maxCitizen = null;
            minCollector = null;
            maxCollector = null;
            currentFilter = 'all';
            currentPage = 0;
            loadMaterials('all', 0);
        }

        function setStatusFilter(filter) {
            resetFilters(); // efface les filtres avancés quand on change le statut
            loadMaterials(filter, 0);
        }

        // ==================== CRUD ====================
        function openCreateModal() {
            document.getElementById('materialId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('materialForm').reset();
            document.getElementById('materialActive').value = 'true';
            document.getElementById('citizenPrice').value = '';
            document.getElementById('collectorPrice').value = '';
            document.getElementById('startDate').value = '';
            document.getElementById('endDate').value = '';
            // Afficher les sections prix et dates
            document.getElementById('priceSection').style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('dateSection').style.display = 'block';
            document.querySelector('#createMaterialModal .modal-title').innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-plus-circle me-2"></i>Créer un matériau';
            showModal('createMaterialModal');
        }

        function editMaterial(id) {
            fetch(`/admin/material/${id}`)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(m => {
                    document.getElementById('materialId').value = m.id;
                    document.getElementById('materialName').value = m.name;
                    document.getElementById('materialDescription').value = m.description || '';
                    document.getElementById('materialActive').value = m.isActive ? 'true' : 'false';
                    // Masquer les sections prix et dates car on ne les modifie pas ici
                    document.getElementById('priceSection').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('dateSection').style.display = 'none';
                    document.querySelector('#createMaterialModal .modal-title').innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-edit me-2"></i>Modifier le matériau';
                    showModal('createMaterialModal');
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        function saveMaterial() {
            const id = document.getElementById('materialId').value;
            const name = document.getElementById('materialName').value;
            const description = document.getElementById('materialDescription').value;
            const isActive = document.getElementById('materialActive').value === 'true';

            if (!name) {
                alert('Le nom est obligatoire');
                return;
            }

            if (id === '') {
                // CRÉATION
                const citizenPrice = parseFloat(document.getElementById('citizenPrice').value);
                const collectorPrice = parseFloat(document.getElementById('collectorPrice').value);
                if (isNaN(citizenPrice) || isNaN(collectorPrice)) {
                    alert('Les prix sont obligatoires pour la création');
                    return;
                }
                const startDate = document.getElementById('startDate').value;
                const endDate = document.getElementById('endDate').value;

                const request = {
                    name: name,
                    description: description,
                    isActive: isActive,
                    citizenPricePerKg: citizenPrice,
                    collectorPricePerKg: collectorPrice,
                    startDate: startDate ? new Date(startDate).toISOString() : null,
                    endDate: endDate ? new Date(endDate).toISOString() : null
                };
                fetch('/admin/material-create', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(request)
                })
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    if (data.success) {
                        hideModal('createMaterialModal');
                        loadMaterials(currentFilter, currentPage);
                        loadStats();
                    } else {
                        alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Création échouée'));
                    }
                })
                .catch(err => alert(err));
            } else {
                // MODIFICATION (uniquement nom, description, actif)
                const request = { name: name, description: description, isActive: isActive };
                fetch(`/admin/material-update/${id}`, {
                    method: 'PUT',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(request)
                })
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    if (data.success) {
                        hideModal('createMaterialModal');
                        loadMaterials(currentFilter, currentPage);
                        loadStats();
                    } else {
                        alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Mise à jour échouée'));
                    }
                })
                .catch(err => alert(err));
            }
        }

        function openPriceModal(materialId) {
            document.getElementById('priceMaterialId').value = materialId;
            document.getElementById('modalCitizenPrice').value = '';
            document.getElementById('modalCollectorPrice').value = '';
            showModal('priceModal');
        }

        function updatePrice() {
            const id = document.getElementById('priceMaterialId').value;
            const citizenPrice = parseFloat(document.getElementById('modalCitizenPrice').value);
            const collectorPrice = parseFloat(document.getElementById('modalCollectorPrice').value);
            if (isNaN(citizenPrice) || isNaN(collectorPrice)) {
                alert('Veuillez saisir des prix valides');
                return;
            }
            const request = { citizenPricePerKg: citizenPrice, collectorPricePerKg: collectorPrice };
            fetch(`/admin/material-price/${id}`, {
                method: 'PUT',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify(request)
            })
            .then(res => res.json())
            .then(data => {
                if (data.success) {
                    hideModal('priceModal');
                    loadMaterials(currentFilter, currentPage);
                    loadStats();
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Mise à jour du prix échouée'));
                }
            })
            .catch(err => alert(err));
        }

        function toggleActive(id, activate) {
            const url = activate ? `/admin/material-activate/${id}` : `/admin/material-deactivate/${id}`;
            fetch(url, { method: 'PUT' })
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    if (data.success) {
                        loadMaterials(currentFilter, currentPage);
                        loadStats();
                    } else {
                        alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Action échouée'));
                    }
                });
        }

        function deleteMaterial(id) {
            if (confirm('Supprimer définitivement ce matériau ? Cette action est irréversible.')) {
                fetch(`/admin/material-delete/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(data => {
                        if (data.success) {
                            loadMaterials(currentFilter, currentPage);
                            loadStats();
                        } else {
                            alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Suppression échouée'));
                        }
                    });
            }
        }

        function viewDetail(id) {
            fetch(`/admin/material/${id}`)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(m => {
                    document.getElementById('detailContent').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <strong>ID:</strong> ${m.id}<br>
                                <strong>Nom:</strong> ${escapeHtml(m.name)}<br>
                                <strong>Description:</strong> ${escapeHtml(m.description) || '-'}<br>
                                <strong>Statut:</strong> <span class="badge ${m.isActive ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-secondary'}">${m.isActive ? 'Actif' : 'Inactif'}</span><br>
                                <strong>Créé le:</strong> ${formatDate(m.createdAt)}<br>
                                <strong># Demandes:</strong> ${m.collectionRequestsCount || 0}<br>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <strong>Prix citoyen (kg):</strong> ${m.basePricePerKg ? m.basePricePerKg.toFixed(3) + ' DA' : '-'}<br>
                                <strong>Prix collecteur (kg):</strong> ${m.collectorPricePerKg ? m.collectorPricePerKg.toFixed(3) + ' DA' : '-'}<br>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    showModal('detailModal');
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        // Initialisation
        loadStats();
        loadMaterials('all', 0);
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>
// resources\templates\admin\notifications.html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html xmlns:th="http://www.thymeleaf.org">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Notifications</title>
    <style>
        .stat-card { transition: transform 0.2s; cursor: default; }
        .stat-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); }
    </style>
</head>
<body th:replace="~{/admin/layout}">

<div th:fragment="sidebarLinks">
    <a th:href="@{/admin/dashboard}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-tachometer-alt"></i> Dashboard</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/users}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> Utilisateurs</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/collectors}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Collecteurs</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/materials}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-recycle"></i> Matériaux</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/challenges}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-trophy"></i> Défis</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/supervision}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> Supervision</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/notifications}" class="sidebar-link active"><i class="fas fa-bell"></i> Notifications</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/anomalies}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i> Anomalies</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/support}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-headset"></i> Support</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/machines}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-microchip"></i> <span>Machines</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/centers}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fa fa-industry"></i> <span>Usines</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/cancellations}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-ban"></i> <span>Annulations abusives</span></a>
</div>

<div th:fragment="content">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h1 class="h3 fw-bold">Notifications</h1>
    </div>

    <!-- Statistiques -->
    <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-light"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>Total envoyées</h6><h3 id="totalNotifications">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-primary bg-opacity-25"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>Clients</h6><h3 id="totalClients">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-warning bg-opacity-25"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>Collecteurs</h6><h3 id="totalCollectors">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-info bg-opacity-25"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>Employés usine</h6><h3 id="totalFactoryUsers">-</h3></div></div></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Onglets -->
    <ul class="nav nav-tabs mb-3">
        <li class="nav-item"><button class="nav-link active" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#sendTab">Envoyer</button></li>
        <li class="nav-item"><button class="nav-link" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#historyTab">Historique</button></li>
    </ul>

    <div class="tab-content">
        <!-- Envoyer -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade show active" id="sendTab">
            <div class="card shadow-sm">
                <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">Envoyer une notification</div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Titre</label><input type="text" id="notifTitle" class="form-control"></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Message</label><textarea id="notifMessage" rows="3" class="form-control"></textarea></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Type</label><select id="notifType" class="form-select"><option value="INFO">INFO</option><option value="WARNING">WARNING</option><option value="SUCCESS">SUCCESS</option><option value="ERROR">ERROR</option></select></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Cible</label>
                        <div class="form-check"><input type="radio" name="targetType" value="role" checked> Par rôle</div>
                        <div class="form-check"><input type="radio" name="targetType" value="users"> Par utilisateurs (IDs)</div>
                    </div>
                    <div id="roleTargetDiv"><label>Rôle</label><select id="targetRole" class="form-select"><option value="CLIENT">Client</option><option value="COLLECTOR">Collecteur</option></select></div>
                    <div id="usersTargetDiv" style="display:none"><label>IDs utilisateurs (séparés par virgule)</label><input type="text" id="targetUserIds" class="form-control" placeholder="1,2,3"></div>
                    <button class="btn btn-primary mt-3" onclick="sendNotification()">Envoyer</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Historique -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade" id="historyTab">
            <div class="card shadow-sm">
                <div class="card-header">Filtres</div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row"><div class="col-md-4"><label>Type</label><select id="historyType" class="form-select"><option value="">Tous</option><option value="INFO">INFO</option><option value="WARNING">WARNING</option><option value="SUCCESS">SUCCESS</option><option value="ERROR">ERROR</option></select></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4"><label>ID utilisateur</label><input type="number" id="historyAccountId" class="form-control"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4"><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="loadHistory()">Filtrer</button><button class="btn btn-secondary ms-2" onclick="resetHistoryFilters()">Reset</button></div></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="card shadow-sm mt-3"><div class="card-body p-0"><div class="table-responsive"><table class="table"><thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Titre</th><th>Type</th><th>Lu</th><th>Date</th></tr></thead><tbody id="historyTableBody"></tbody></table></div></div>
                <div class="card-footer"><nav id="historyPagination"></nav></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script th:inline="javascript">
        let historyPage = 0;

        // ==========================
        // TOGGLE ROLE / USERS
        // ==========================

        function toggleTargetDivs() {

            const selected =
                document.querySelector(
                    'input[name="targetType"]:checked'
                )?.value;

            const roleDiv =
                document.getElementById(
                    "roleTargetDiv"
                );

            const usersDiv =
                document.getElementById(
                    "usersTargetDiv"
                );

            if (!roleDiv || !usersDiv)
                return;

            if (selected === "role") {

                roleDiv.style.display =
                    "block";

                usersDiv.style.display =
                    "none";

            } else {

                roleDiv.style.display =
                    "none";

                usersDiv.style.display =
                    "block";
            }
        }

        // rendre globale
        window.toggleTargetDivs =
            toggleTargetDivs;

        // ==========================
        // SEND NOTIFICATION
        // ==========================

        window.sendNotification =
            async function () {

            try {

                const title =
                    document
                        .getElementById(
                            "notifTitle"
                        )
                        .value
                        .trim();

                const message =
                    document
                        .getElementById(
                            "notifMessage"
                        )
                        .value
                        .trim();

                const type =
                    document
                        .getElementById(
                            "notifType"
                        )
                        .value;

                if (
                    !title ||
                    !message
                ) {

                    alert(
                        "Veuillez remplir tous les champs."
                    );

                    return;
                }

                const selectedTarget =
                    document.querySelector(
                        'input[name="targetType"]:checked'
                    )?.value;

                const body = {
                    title,
                    message,
                    type
                };

                let endpoint = "";

                // ======================
                // ROLE
                // ======================

                if (
                    selectedTarget
                    === "role"
                ) {

                    const role =
                        document
                            .getElementById(
                                "targetRole"
                            )
                            .value;

                    if (!role) {

                        alert(
                            "Veuillez choisir un rôle."
                        );

                        return;
                    }

                    body.targetRole =
                        role;

                    endpoint =
                        "/admin/notifications/broadcast";
                }

                // ======================
                // USERS IDS
                // ======================

                else {

                    const idsInput =
                        document
                            .getElementById(
                                "targetUserIds"
                            )
                            .value;

                    const ids =
                        idsInput
                            .split(",")

                            .map(id =>
                                parseInt(
                                    id.trim()
                                )
                            )

                            .filter(id =>
                                !isNaN(id)
                            );

                    if (
                        ids.length === 0
                    ) {

                        alert(
                            "Veuillez entrer au moins un ID."
                        );

                        return;
                    }

                    body.targetAccountIds =
                        ids;

                    endpoint =
                        "/admin/notifications/send";
                }

                const response =
                    await fetch(
                        endpoint,
                        {
                            method:
                                "POST",

                            headers: {
                                "Content-Type":
                                    "application/json"
                            },

                            body:
                                JSON.stringify(
                                    body
                                )
                        }
                    );

                const result =
                    await response
                        .json();

                if (
                    !response.ok
                ) {

                    throw new Error(
                        result.message ||
                        "Erreur lors de l'envoi"
                    );
                }

                alert(
                    result.message
                    ||
                    "Notification envoyée avec succès."
                );

                // reset formulaire

                document
                    .getElementById(
                        "notifTitle"
                    )
                    .value = "";

                document
                    .getElementById(
                        "notifMessage"
                    )
                    .value = "";

                document
                    .getElementById(
                        "targetUserIds"
                    )
                    .value = "";

                document
                    .querySelector(
                        'input[value="role"]'
                    )
                    .checked = true;

                toggleTargetDivs();

                loadHistory();

            } catch (
                error
            ) {

                console.error(
                    "Erreur notification:",
                    error
                );

                alert(
                    error.message
                );
            }
        };

        // ==========================
        // LOAD HISTORY
        // ==========================

        window.loadHistory =
            async function () {

            try {

                let url =
                    `/admin/notifications-history?page=${historyPage}&size=10`;

                const type =
                    document
                        .getElementById(
                            "historyType"
                        )?.value;

                const accountId =
                    document
                        .getElementById(
                            "historyAccountId"
                        )?.value;

                if (type) {
                    url +=
                        `&type=${type}`;
                }

                if (accountId) {
                    url +=
                        `&accountId=${accountId}`;
                }

                const response =
                    await fetch(
                        url
                    );

                if (
                    !response.ok
                ) {

                    throw new Error(
                        `Erreur ${response.status}`
                    );
                }

                const result =
                    await response
                        .json();

                const list =
                    result.content;

                const tbody =
                    document
                        .getElementById(
                            "historyTableBody"
                        );

                tbody.innerHTML =
                    "";

                if (
                    !list ||
                    list.length === 0
                ) {

                    tbody.innerHTML =
                        `
                        <tr>
                            <td colspan="5"
                                class="text-center text-muted">
                                Aucune notification
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    `;

                    return;
                }

                list.forEach(
                    n => {

                    tbody.innerHTML +=
                    `
                    <tr>
                        <td>${n.id}</td>
                        <td>${n.title}</td>
                        <td>
                            <span class="badge bg-secondary">
                                ${n.type}
                            </span>
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            ${n.isRead
                                ? '<span class="badge bg-success">Lu</span>'
                                : '<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">Non lu</span>'}
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            ${new Date(
                                n.createdAt
                            ).toLocaleString(
                                "fr-FR"
                            )}
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    `;
                });

            } catch (
                error
            ) {

                console.error(
                    "Erreur historique:",
                    error
                );

                const tbody =
                    document.getElementById(
                        "historyTableBody"
                    );

                if (tbody) {

                    tbody.innerHTML =
                    `
                    <tr>
                        <td colspan="5"
                            class="text-center text-danger">
                            Erreur chargement historique
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    `;
                }
            }
        };

        // ==========================
        // RESET FILTERS
        // ==========================

        window.resetHistoryFilters =
            function () {

            document
                .getElementById(
                    "historyType"
                )
                .value = "";

            document
                .getElementById(
                    "historyAccountId"
                )
                .value = "";

            historyPage = 0;

            loadHistory();
        };

        // ==========================
        // INIT PAGE
        // ==========================

        document
            .addEventListener(
            "DOMContentLoaded",

            function () {

                document
                    .querySelectorAll(
                        'input[name="targetType"]'
                    )

                    .forEach(
                        radio => {

                        radio
                            .addEventListener(
                                "change",

                                toggleTargetDivs
                            );
                    });

                toggleTargetDivs();

                loadHistory();
            }
        );
    </script>
</div>

</body>
</html>
// resources\templates\admin\supervision.html

        .badge-pending { background-color: #ffc107; color: #000; }
        .badge-accepted { background-color: #0d6efd; }

        .badge-validated { background-color: #198754; }

        .badge-refused { background-color: #dc3545; }

        .table-image-cell { text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; }

<div th:fragment="sidebarLinks">
    <a th:href="@{/admin/dashboard}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-tachometer-alt"></i> <span>Dashboard</span></a>

    <a th:href="@{/admin/supervision}" class="sidebar-link active"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> <span>Supervision</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/notifications}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-bell"></i> <span>Notifications</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/anomalies}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i> <span>Anomalies</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/support}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-headset"></i> <span>Support</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/machines}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-microchip"></i> <span>Machines</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/centers}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fa fa-industry"></i> <span>Usines</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/cancellations}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-ban"></i> <span>Annulations abusives</span></a>
</div>

<div th:fragment="content">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h1 class="h3 fw-bold">Supervision des collectes</h1>
    </div>

    <!-- Cartes statistiques -->
    <div class="row g-3 mb-4" id="statsCards">
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-light border-0 shadow-sm"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6 class="text-muted">Total demandes</h6><h3 id="totalRequests">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-warning bg-opacity-25 border-0 shadow-sm"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6 class="text-muted">En attente</h6><h3 id="pendingRequests">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-danger bg-opacity-25 border-0 shadow-sm"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6 class="text-muted">Litiges</h6><h3 id="disputedRequests">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-info bg-opacity-25 border-0 shadow-sm"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6 class="text-muted">En attente validation usine</h6><h3 id="pendingValidation">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-success bg-opacity-25 border-0 shadow-sm"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6 class="text-muted">Validées</h6><h3 id="validatedDeliveries">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-secondary bg-opacity-25 border-0 shadow-sm"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6 class="text-muted">Refusées</h6><h3 id="refusedDeliveries">-</h3></div></div></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Onglets -->
    <ul class="nav nav-tabs mb-3" id="supervisionTab" role="tablist">
        <li class="nav-item"><button class="nav-link active" id="requests-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#requests">Toutes les demandes</button></li>
        <li class="nav-item"><button class="nav-link" id="disputes-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#disputes">Litiges</button></li>
        <li class="nav-item"><button class="nav-link" id="validations-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#validations">Validations usine</button></li>
    </ul>

    <div class="tab-content">
        <!-- ==================== ONGLET DEMANDES ==================== -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade show active" id="requests">
            <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm mb-3">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row g-3 align-items-end">
                        <div class="col-md-2"><label>Statut</label><select id="filterStatus" class="form-select"><option value="">Tous</option><option value="PENDING">En attente</option><option value="ACCEPTED">Acceptée</option><option value="COLLECTED">Collectée</option><option value="DELIVERED">Livrée</option><option value="CANCELLED">Annulée</option></select></div>
                        <div class="col-md-2"><label>Client ID</label><input type="number" id="filterClientId" class="form-control" placeholder="ID client"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-2"><label>Collecteur ID</label><input type="number" id="filterCollectorId" class="form-control" placeholder="ID collecteur"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-2"><label>Matériau ID</label><input type="number" id="filterMaterialId" class="form-control" placeholder="ID matériau"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-2"><label>Date début</label><input type="datetime-local" id="filterStartDate" class="form-control"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-2"><label>Date fin</label><input type="datetime-local" id="filterEndDate" class="form-control"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-12"><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="applyFilters()">Filtrer</button><button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="resetFilters()">Réinitialiser</button></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
                <div class="card-body p-0">
                    <div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">
                            <thead class="table-light">
                            <tr><th>ID</th><th>Statut</th><th>Client</th><th>Matériau</th><th>Quantité est.</th><th>Collecteur</th><th>Date création</th><th>Actions</th></tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody id="requestsTableBody"><tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center py-4">Chargement...</td></tr></tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card-footer bg-white"><nav id="requestsPagination"></nav></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- ==================== ONGLET LITIGES ==================== -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade" id="disputes">
            <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
                <div class="card-body p-0">
                    <div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">
                            <thead class="table-light">
                            <tr><th>ID demande</th><th>Statut</th><th>Client</th><th>Collecteur</th><th>Montant estimé</th><th>Motif litige</th><th>Ticket lié</th><th>Date</th></tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody id="disputesTableBody"><tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center py-4">Chargement...</td></tr></tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card-footer bg-white"><nav id="disputesPagination"></nav></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- ==================== ONGLET VALIDATIONS USINE ==================== -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade" id="validations">
            <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm mb-3">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row g-3 align-items-end">
                        <div class="col-md-3"><label>Statut livraison</label><select id="deliveryStatusFilter" class="form-select"><option value="">Tous</option><option value="PENDING">En attente</option><option value="VALIDATED">Validée</option><option value="ADJUSTED">Ajustée</option><option value="REFUSED">Refusée</option><option value="PROCESSING">En traitement</option><option value="COMPLETED">Terminée</option></select></div>
                        <div class="col-md-3"><label>Client ID</label><input type="number" id="valClientId" class="form-control" placeholder="ID client"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-3"><label>Collecteur ID</label><input type="number" id="valCollectorId" class="form-control" placeholder="ID collecteur"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-3"><label>Matériau ID</label><input type="number" id="valMaterialId" class="form-control" placeholder="ID matériau"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-12"><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="applyValFilters()">Filtrer</button><button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="resetValFilters()">Réinitialiser</button></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
                <div class="card-body p-0">
                    <div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">
                            <thead class="table-light">
                            <tr>
                                <th>ID livraison</th>
                                <th>Collecte</th>
                                <th>Client</th>
                                <th>Collecteur</th>
                                <th>Matériau</th>
                                <th>Usine</th>
                                <th>Poids déclaré (kg)</th>
                                <th>Poids validé (kg)</th>
                                <th>Statut</th>
                                <th>Ajustement / Rejet</th>
                                <th>Validé par</th>
                                <th>Date validation</th>
                                <th>Actions</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody id="validationsTableBody"><tr><td colspan="13" class="text-center py-4">Chargement...</td></tr></tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card-footer bg-white"><nav id="validationsPagination"></nav></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL DÉTAIL DEMANDE -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="detailModal" tabindex="-1">
        <div class="modal-dialog modal-xl">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-secondary text-white"><h5 class="modal-title">Détail de la demande</h5><button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button></div>
                <div class="modal-body" id="detailContent">Chargement...</div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Fermer</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-danger" id="forceCancelBtn" style="display:none" onclick="openForceCancelModal()">Annuler forcément</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-warning" id="reassignBtn" style="display:none" onclick="openReassignModal()">Réassigner</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL ANNULATION FORCÉE -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="forceCancelModal" tabindex="-1">
        <div class="modal-dialog"><div class="modal-content"><div class="modal-header bg-danger text-white"><h5 class="modal-title">Annulation forcée</h5><button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button></div>
            <div class="modal-body"><input type="hidden" id="cancelRequestId"><p>Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir annuler cette demande ? Cette action est irréversible.</p></div>
            <div class="modal-footer"><button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button><button type="button" class="btn btn-danger" onclick="confirmForceCancel()">Confirmer l'annulation</button></div></div></div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL RÉASSIGNATION -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="reassignModal" tabindex="-1">
        <div class="modal-dialog"><div class="modal-content"><div class="modal-header bg-warning text-dark"><h5 class="modal-title">Réassigner à un collecteur</h5><button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button></div>
            <div class="modal-body"><input type="hidden" id="reassignRequestId"><div class="mb-3"><label class="form-label">Nouveau collecteur ID *</label><input type="number" id="newCollectorId" class="form-control" required></div></div>
            <div class="modal-footer"><button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button><button type="button" class="btn btn-warning" onclick="confirmReassign()">Réassigner</button></div></div></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let requestsPage = 0, requestsTotalPages = 0, requestsFilter = {};
        let disputesPage = 0, disputesTotalPages = 0;
        let validationsPage = 0, validationsTotalPages = 0, valFilters = {};

        // Statistiques
        function loadStats() {
            fetch('/admin/supervision-stats').then(res=>res.json()).then(data=>{
                document.getElementById('totalRequests').innerText = data.totalRequests || 0;
                document.getElementById('pendingRequests').innerText = data.pendingRequests || 0;
                document.getElementById('disputedRequests').innerText = data.disputedRequests || 0;
                document.getElementById('pendingValidation').innerText = data.collectionsPendingValidation || 0;
                document.getElementById('validatedDeliveries').innerText = data.validatedDeliveries || 0;
                document.getElementById('refusedDeliveries').innerText = data.refusedDeliveries || 0;
            }).catch(err=>console.error('Stats error:',err));
        }

        // ---------- REQUESTS ----------
        function applyFilters() {
            requestsFilter = {
                status: document.getElementById('filterStatus').value,
                clientId: document.getElementById('filterClientId').value,
                collectorId: document.getElementById('filterCollectorId').value,
                materialId: document.getElementById('filterMaterialId').value,
                startDate: document.getElementById('filterStartDate').value,
                endDate: document.getElementById('filterEndDate').value
            };
            requestsPage = 0;
            loadRequests();
        }
        function resetFilters() {
            document.getElementById('filterStatus').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterClientId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterCollectorId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterMaterialId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterStartDate').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterEndDate').value = '';
            requestsFilter = {};
            requestsPage = 0;
            loadRequests();
        }
        function loadRequests() {
            let url = `/admin/supervision-requests?page=${requestsPage}&size=20`;
            if (requestsFilter.status) url += `&status=${requestsFilter.status}`;
            if (requestsFilter.clientId) url += `&clientId=${requestsFilter.clientId}`;
            if (requestsFilter.collectorId) url += `&collectorId=${requestsFilter.collectorId}`;
            if (requestsFilter.materialId) url += `&materialId=${requestsFilter.materialId}`;
            if (requestsFilter.startDate) url += `&startDate=${encodeURIComponent(requestsFilter.startDate)}`;
            if (requestsFilter.endDate) url += `&endDate=${encodeURIComponent(requestsFilter.endDate)}`;
            fetch(url).then(res=>res.json()).then(pageData=>{
                renderRequestsTable(pageData.content);
                requestsTotalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                renderRequestsPagination(pageData);
            }).catch(err=>console.error('Requests error:',err));
        }
        function renderRequestsTable(requests) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('requestsTableBody');
            if(!requests||!requests.length){tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center">Aucune demande</td></tr>';return;}
            tbody.innerHTML = requests.map(r=>`<tr>
                <td>${r.requestId}</td>
                <td><span class="badge ${getStatusBadgeClass(r.status)}">${r.status}</span></td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(r.clientFullName)}<br><small>#${r.clientId}</small></td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(r.materialName)||'-'}</td>
                <td>${r.estimatedQuantity} kg</td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(r.collectorFullName)||'-'}<br><small>#${r.collectorId||'-'}</small></td>
                <td>${formatDate(r.createdAt)}</td>
                <td><button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-info" onclick="viewDetail(${r.requestId})"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> Détail</button></td>
            </tr>`).join('');
        }
        function getStatusBadgeClass(s){const m={'PENDING':'bg-warning text-dark','ACCEPTED':'bg-primary','COLLECTED':'bg-success','DELIVERED':'bg-info text-dark','CANCELLED':'bg-secondary'};return m[s]||'bg-secondary';}
        function renderRequestsPagination(pd){
            const nav=document.getElementById('requestsPagination');
            if(requestsTotalPages<=1){nav.innerHTML='';return;}
            let html='<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pd.first?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeRequestsPage(${requestsPage-1})">Précédent</a></li>`;
            for(let i=0;i<requestsTotalPages;i++)html+=`<li class="page-item ${i===requestsPage?'active':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeRequestsPage(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pd.last?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeRequestsPage(${requestsPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML=html;
        }
        function changeRequestsPage(p){if(p<0)p=0;requestsPage=p;loadRequests();}

        // ---------- DISPUTES ----------
        function loadDisputes() {
            fetch(`/admin/supervision-disputes?page=${disputesPage}&size=20`).then(res=>res.json()).then(pageData=>{
                renderDisputesTable(pageData.content);
                disputesTotalPages=pageData.totalPages;
                renderDisputesPagination(pageData);
            }).catch(err=>console.error('Disputes error:',err));
        }
        function renderDisputesTable(disputes){
            const tbody=document.getElementById('disputesTableBody');
            if(!disputes||!disputes.length){tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="8">Aucun litige</td></tr>';return;}
            tbody.innerHTML=disputes.map(d=>`<tr>
                <td>${d.requestId}</td>
                <td><span class="badge ${getStatusBadgeClass(d.requestStatus)}">${d.requestStatus}</span></td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(d.clientFullName)}</td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(d.collectorFullName)||'-'}</td>
                <td>${d.estimatedAmount} DA</td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(d.disputeReason)}</td>
                <td>${d.relatedTicketId?`<a href="#" onclick="viewTicket(${d.relatedTicketId})">#${d.relatedTicketId}</a>`:'-'}</td>
                <td>${formatDate(d.createdAt)}</td>
            </tr>`).join('');
        }
        function renderDisputesPagination(pd){
            const nav=document.getElementById('disputesPagination');
            if(disputesTotalPages<=1){nav.innerHTML='';return;}
            let html='<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pd.first?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeDisputesPage(${disputesPage-1})">Précédent</a></li>`;
            for(let i=0;i<disputesTotalPages;i++)html+=`<li class="page-item ${i===disputesPage?'active':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeDisputesPage(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pd.last?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeDisputesPage(${disputesPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML=html;
        }
        function changeDisputesPage(p){if(p<0)p=0;disputesPage=p;loadDisputes();}

        // ---------- VALIDATIONS USINE (avec photo, détails et usine) ----------
        function applyValFilters() {
            valFilters = {
                status: document.getElementById('deliveryStatusFilter').value,
                clientId: document.getElementById('valClientId').value,
                collectorId: document.getElementById('valCollectorId').value,
                materialId: document.getElementById('valMaterialId').value
            };
            validationsPage = 0;
            loadValidations();
        }
        function resetValFilters() {
            document.getElementById('deliveryStatusFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('valClientId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('valCollectorId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('valMaterialId').value = '';
            valFilters = {};
            validationsPage = 0;
            loadValidations();
        }
        function loadValidations() {
            let url = `/admin/supervision/deliveries?page=${validationsPage}&size=20`;
            if (valFilters.status) url += `&status=${valFilters.status}`;
            if (valFilters.clientId) url += `&clientId=${valFilters.clientId}`;
            if (valFilters.collectorId) url += `&collectorId=${valFilters.collectorId}`;
            if (valFilters.materialId) url += `&materialId=${valFilters.materialId}`;
            fetch(url).then(res=>res.json()).then(pageData=>{
                renderValidationsTable(pageData.content);
                validationsTotalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                renderValidationsPagination(pageData);
            }).catch(err=>console.error('Validations error:',err));
        }
        function renderValidationsTable(deliveries){
            const tbody = document.getElementById('validationsTableBody');
            if(!deliveries||!deliveries.length){tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="13" class="text-center">Aucune livraison</td></tr>';return;}
            tbody.innerHTML = deliveries.map(d=>{
                let statusBadge = '';
                if(d.status==='VALIDATED') statusBadge='<span class="badge bg-success">Validée</span>';
                else if(d.status==='ADJUSTED') statusBadge='<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">Ajustée</span>';
                else if(d.status==='REFUSED') statusBadge='<span class="badge bg-danger">Refusée</span>';
                else if(d.status==='PENDING') statusBadge='<span class="badge bg-secondary">En attente</span>';
                else if(d.status==='PROCESSING') statusBadge='<span class="badge bg-info">En traitement</span>';
                else if(d.status==='COMPLETED') statusBadge='<span class="badge bg-success">Terminée</span>';
                else statusBadge=`<span class="badge bg-secondary">${d.status}</span>`;
                const adjOrRej = d.adjustmentNote ? d.adjustmentNote : (d.rejectionReason ? d.rejectionReason : '-');
                let photoHtml = '-';
                if(d.wastePhoto) {
                    let photoUrl = d.wastePhoto;
                    if(!photoUrl.startsWith('http') && !photoUrl.startsWith('/')) photoUrl = '/' + photoUrl;
                    photoHtml = `<img src="${photoUrl}" class="image-thumb" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); window.open('${photoUrl}')" style="cursor:pointer;" title="Agrandir la photo">`;
                }
                return `<tr>
                    <td>${d.deliveryId}</td>
                    <td>#${d.collectionId}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(d.clientName)}<br><small>#${d.clientId}</small></td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(d.collectorName)||'-'}<br><small>#${d.collectorId||'-'}</small></td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(d.materialName)||'-'}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(d.recyclingCenterName)||'-'}</td>
                    <td>${d.declaredWeight} kg</td>
                    <td>${d.validatedWeight ? d.validatedWeight+' kg' : '-'}</td>
                    <td>${statusBadge}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(adjOrRej)}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(d.validatedByName)||'-'}</td>
                    <td>${formatDate(d.validatedAt)}</td>
                    <td><button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-info" onclick="viewDetailFromCollectionId(${d.collectionId})"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> Détail</button></td>
                </tr>`;
            }).join('');
        }
        function renderValidationsPagination(pd){
            const nav=document.getElementById('validationsPagination');
            if(validationsTotalPages<=1){nav.innerHTML='';return;}
            let html='<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pd.first?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeValidationsPage(${validationsPage-1})">Précédent</a></li>`;
            for(let i=0;i<validationsTotalPages;i++)html+=`<li class="page-item ${i===validationsPage?'active':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeValidationsPage(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pd.last?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeValidationsPage(${validationsPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML=html;
        }
        function changeValidationsPage(p){if(p<0)p=0;validationsPage=p;loadValidations();}

        // ---------- DÉTAIL DEMANDE ----------
        let currentRequestId = null;
        function viewDetail(requestId) {
            currentRequestId = requestId;
            fetch(`/admin/supervision-request/${requestId}`)
                .then(res => { if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`); return res.json(); })
                .then(detail => {
                    document.getElementById('detailContent').innerHTML = generateDetailHtml(detail);
                    const canCancel = (detail.requestStatus !== 'CANCELLED' && detail.requestStatus !== 'COLLECTED' && detail.requestStatus !== 'DELIVERED');
                    const canReassign = (detail.requestStatus === 'PENDING' || detail.requestStatus === 'ACCEPTED') && !detail.collectionId;
                    document.getElementById('forceCancelBtn').style.display = canCancel ? 'inline-block' : 'none';
                    document.getElementById('reassignBtn').style.display = canReassign ? 'inline-block' : 'none';
                    showModal('detailModal');
                })
                .catch(err => {
                    console.error('Erreur chargement détail:', err);
                    document.getElementById('detailContent').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">Impossible de charger les détails de la demande #${requestId}.</div>`;
                    showModal('detailModal');
                });
        }

        function viewDetailFromCollectionId(collectionId) {
            fetch('/admin/supervision-requests?size=1000')
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(page => {
                    const found = page.content.find(req => req.collectionId === collectionId);
                    if (found) viewDetail(found.requestId);
                    else alert(`Aucune demande trouvée pour la collecte #${collectionId}`);
                })
                .catch(err => {
                    console.error('Erreur recherche collection->request:', err);
                    alert(`Erreur lors de la recherche de la demande associée à la collecte #${collectionId}`);
                });
        }

        function generateDetailHtml(d) {
            const buildImageUrl = (url) => {
                if (!url) return null;
                if (url.startsWith('http')) return url;
                if (url.startsWith('/')) return url;
                return '/' + url;
            };
            const wasteImage = buildImageUrl(d.wasteImageUrl);
            return `
            <div class="row">
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <strong>ID demande:</strong> ${d.requestId}<br>
                    <strong>Statut:</strong> ${d.requestStatus}<br>
                    <strong>Client:</strong> ${escapeHtml(d.clientFullName)} (${escapeHtml(d.clientEmail)})<br>
                    <strong>Adresse:</strong> ${escapeHtml(d.clientAddress)}<br>
                    <strong>Matériau:</strong> ${d.materialName}<br>
                    <strong>Quantité estimée:</strong> ${d.estimatedQuantity} kg<br>
                    <strong>Montant estimé:</strong> ${d.estimatedAmount} DA<br>
                    <strong>Prix collecteur:</strong> ${d.collectorPrice} DA<br>
                    <strong>Classification IA:</strong> Matériau prédit: ${d.predictedMaterialId}, Poids: ${d.predictedWeight} kg, Score: ${d.confidenceScore}<br>
                    <strong>Validé IA:</strong> ${d.aiValidated ? 'Oui' : 'Non'}
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <strong>Collecteur:</strong> ${escapeHtml(d.collectorFullName)}<br>
                    <strong>Collecte ID:</strong> ${d.collectionId}<br>
                    <strong>Quantité réelle:</strong> ${d.realQuantity} kg<br>
                    <strong>Total payé:</strong> ${d.totalAmount} DA<br>
                    <strong>Livraison:</strong> ${d.deliveryStatus}<br>
                    <strong>Validation usine:</strong> Poids validé: ${d.validatedWeight} kg, Note: ${escapeHtml(d.adjustmentNote)}<br>
                    <strong>Litige:</strong> ${d.hasOpenTicket ? 'Ticket ouvert' : 'Non'}
                </div>
            </div>
            <hr>
            <div class="row">
                <div class="col-md-12 text-center">
                    <strong>Photo des déchets (client)</strong><br>
                    ${wasteImage ? `<img src="${wasteImage}" class="image-thumb" style="max-height:200px; cursor:pointer;" onclick="window.open('${wasteImage}')">` : '<span class="text-muted">Non disponible</span>'}
                </div>
            </div>`;
        }

        // Annulation forcée et réassignation
        function openForceCancelModal(){document.getElementById('cancelRequestId').value=currentRequestId;showModal('forceCancelModal');}
        function confirmForceCancel(){
            const id=document.getElementById('cancelRequestId').value;
            fetch(`/admin/supervision-request/${id}/force-cancel`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({reason:"Annulation forcée par l'administrateur"})})
            .then(res=>res.json()).then(data=>{if(data.success){hideModal('forceCancelModal');hideModal('detailModal');loadRequests();loadStats();alert('Demande annulée');}else alert('Erreur: '+data.message);})
            .catch(err=>alert('Erreur réseau'));
        }
        function openReassignModal(){document.getElementById('reassignRequestId').value=currentRequestId;document.getElementById('newCollectorId').value='';showModal('reassignModal');}
        function confirmReassign(){
            const id=document.getElementById('reassignRequestId').value;
            const collectorId=document.getElementById('newCollectorId').value;
            if(!collectorId){alert('ID collecteur requis');return;}
            fetch(`/admin/supervision-request/${id}/reassign`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({collectorId:parseInt(collectorId)})})
            .then(res=>res.json()).then(data=>{if(data.success){hideModal('reassignModal');hideModal('detailModal');loadRequests();loadStats();alert('Demande réassignée');}else alert('Erreur: '+data.message);})
            .catch(err=>alert('Erreur réseau'));
        }
        function viewTicket(ticketId){window.location.href=`/admin/support?ticketId=${ticketId}`;}
        function showModal(id){new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById(id)).show();}
        function hideModal(id){const m=bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById(id));if(m)m.hide();}
        function escapeHtml(s){if(!s)return '';return s.replace(/[&<>]/g,m=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;'}[m]));}
        function formatDate(d){if(!d)return '-';return new Date(d).toLocaleString('fr-FR');}

        // Initialisation
        loadStats(); loadRequests(); loadDisputes(); loadValidations();
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

        .stat-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); }
        .badge-open { background-color: #dc3545; }
        .badge-in-progress { background-color: #ffc107; color: #000; }
        .badge-closed { background-color: #28a745; }
        .ticket-message { max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto; background: #f8f9fa; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 8px; }

        .faq-category { font-weight: bold; color: #0d6efd; margin-top: 1rem; }
    </style>
</head>

        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-danger bg-opacity-25"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>Ouverts</h6><h3 id="openTickets">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-warning bg-opacity-25"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>En cours</h6><h3 id="inProgressTickets">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-success bg-opacity-25"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>Fermés</h6><h3 id="closedTickets">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-info bg-opacity-25"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>FAQ total</h6><h3 id="totalFaqs">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-success bg-opacity-25"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>FAQ actives</h6><h3 id="activeFaqs">-</h3></div></div></div>

    <div class="tab-content">
        <!-- ==================== ONGLET TICKETS ==================== -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade show active" id="tickets" role="tabpanel">
            <!-- Filtres tickets -->
            <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm mb-3">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row g-3 align-items-end">
                        <div class="col-md-3"><label>Statut</label><select id="ticketStatusFilter" class="form-select"><option value="">Tous</option><option value="OPEN">Ouvert</option><option value="IN_PROGRESS">En cours</option><option value="CLOSED">Fermé</option></select></div>
                        <div class="col-md-3"><label>Rôle</label><select id="ticketRoleFilter" class="form-select"><option value="">Tous</option><option value="CITIZEN">Citoyen</option><option value="COLLECTOR">Collecteur</option></select></div>
                        <div class="col-md-3"><label>ID utilisateur</label><input type="number" id="ticketAccountFilter" class="form-control" placeholder="ID compte"></div>

                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Tableau tickets -->

                <div class="card-footer bg-white"><nav id="ticketsPagination"></nav></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- ==================== ONGLET FAQ ==================== -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade" id="faq" role="tabpanel">
